title: Totem Oi oi oi a eye eye
description: make your totem look like Oi oi oi a eye eye Meme
body: Totme Oi oi oi a eye eye is a fun, simple, and lightweight Minecraft resource pack that transforms the ordinary Totem of Undying into something entirely new and humorous. Instead of the default emerald-colored design, this pack adds a fresh, meme-inspired texture that makes every revival moment feel unique and funny
